{{nihongo|'''Kataakatatsuno Shrine'''|方県津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kataakatatsuno Shrine'''|方県津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kataakatatsuno Shrine'''|方県津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Kataakatatsuno Shrine'''|方県津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kataakatatsuno Shrine'''|方県津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kataakatatsuno Shrine'''|方県津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]].
